claim: Agent composes a labelled, validated settings form using Field.Root + Label + Input + Button.
prompt: Build a single-file Settings.svelte with three fields: display name (required), email (required, email type), and a notifications toggle. Show inline validation errors on submit, and a Save button. Use DryUI's Field compound and Toggle. No raw <input> or <label>.

acceptance_checks.description: `dryui check Settings.svelte` reports zero errors and zero warnings.
Field.Root wraps every labelled control; Button is used for Save.
Form controls have associated labels and visible focus rings.
